info.name: Leave Management - Complete API
info.description: Complete API endpoints for Leave Management module including Leave Types, Leave Requests, Leave Balances, and Leave Allocations. All endpoints with expected responses.

item.name: 01 - Leave Types
item.description: Manage leave types (Annual, Sick, Personal, etc.)

request.description: Get all available leave types. No special permission required (just authentication).

response.name: Success - Leave Types Retrieved
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Leave types retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "leaveTypes": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Annual Leave",
        "days_per_year": 20,
        "is_paid": true,
        "allow_carryover": true,
        "carryover_limit": 5,
        "is_active": true,
        "created_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"
      },
      {
        "id": 2,
        "name": "Sick Leave",
        "days_per_year": 10,
        "is_paid": true,
        "allow_carryover": false,
        "carryover_limit": 0,
        "is_active": true,
        "created_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"
      },
      {
        "id": 3,
        "name": "Personal Leave",
        "days_per_year": 5,
        "is_paid": false,
        "allow_carryover": false,
        "carryover_limit": 0,
        "is_active": true,
        "created_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"
      }
    ]
  }
}

request.description: Get a specific leave type by ID.

response.name: Success - Leave Type Retrieved
Error - Leave Type Not Found

request.description: Create a new leave type. Requires 'leave:request' permission.

response.name: Success - Leave Type Created
Error - Duplicate Name

request.description: Update an existing leave type. Requires 'leave:approve' permission.

response.name: Success - Leave Type Updated

request.description: Deactivate a leave type (soft delete). Requires 'leave:approve' permission.

response.name: Success - Leave Type Deactivated
Error - Leave Type Not Found

item.name: 02 - Leave Requests (User's Own)
item.description: Endpoints for users to manage their own leave requests

request.description: Get the current logged-in user's own leave requests. No special permission needed.

response.name: Success - My Leave Requests Retrieved

item.name: Get My Leave Requests (Filtered by Status)

query.description: Filter by status: submitted, approved, rejected, cancelled

request.description: Get current user's leave requests filtered by status.

response.name: Success - Filtered Requests

request.description: Get current user's leave requests with pagination.

response.name: Success - Paginated Requests

request.description: Get current user's leave balances by leave type. No special permission needed.

response.name: Success - Leave Balances Retrieved
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Leave balances retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "balances": [
      {
        "leave_type_id": 1,
        "leave_type_name": "Annual Leave",
        "allocated_days": 20,
        "used_days": 5,
        "carried_over_days": 2,
        "remaining_days": 17,
        "cycle_start_date": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z",
        "cycle_end_date": "2026-12-31T00:00:00Z"
      },
      {
        "leave_type_id": 2,
        "leave_type_name": "Sick Leave",
        "allocated_days": 10,
        "used_days": 3,
        "carried_over_days": 0,
        "remaining_days": 7,
        "cycle_start_date": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z",
        "cycle_end_date": "2026-12-31T00:00:00Z"
      },
      {
        "leave_type_id": 3,
        "leave_type_name": "Personal Leave",
        "allocated_days": 5,
        "used_days": 0,
        "carried_over_days": 0,
        "remaining_days": 5,
        "cycle_start_date": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z",
        "cycle_end_date": "2026-12-31T00:00:00Z"
      }
    ]
  }
}

request.description: Get current user's own leave allocations with details. No special permission needed.

response.name: Success - My Allocations Retrieved
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Your leave allocations retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "allocations": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "user_id": 123,
        "leave_type_id": 1,
        "leave_type_name": "Annual Leave",
        "cycle_start_date": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z",
        "cycle_end_date": "2026-12-31T00:00:00Z",
        "allocated_days": 20,
        "used_days": 5,
        "carried_over_days": 2,
        "remaining_days": 17,
        "created_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"
      },
      {
        "id": 2,
        "user_id": 123,
        "leave_type_id": 2,
        "leave_type_name": "Sick Leave",
        "cycle_start_date": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z",
        "cycle_end_date": "2026-12-31T00:00:00Z",
        "allocated_days": 10,
        "used_days": 3,
        "carried_over_days": 0,
        "remaining_days": 7,
        "created_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"
      }
    ]
  }
}

request.description: Create a new leave request. Requires 'leave:create' permission.

response.name: Success - Leave Request Created
Error - Insufficient Leave Balance
Error - Start Date in Past
Error - No Allocation Found

item.name: Get Single Leave Request by ID

request.description: Get a specific leave request by ID. Owner or admin can view.

response.name: Success - Leave Request Retrieved
Error - Leave Request Not Found
Error - Permission Denied

request.description: Cancel your own leave request. Requires 'leave:delete' permission. Only submitted requests can be cancelled.

response.name: Success - Leave Request Cancelled
Error - Cannot Cancel Approved Request

item.name: 03 - Leave Requests (Admin/HR Management)
item.description: Endpoints for HR/Admin to manage all leave requests across the organization

query.description: Filter by status: submitted, approved, rejected, cancelled

request.description: Get all leave requests. Requires 'leave:read' permission. Only HR/Admin should have this.

response.name: Success - All Leave Requests Retrieved

item.name: Get Leave Requests for Specific User (HR/Admin)

query.description: The user ID to filter by

request.description: Get leave requests for a specific user by ID. Requires 'leave:read' permission.

response.name: Success - User's Leave Requests Retrieved

query.description: The user ID to filter by

request.description: Get only pending (submitted) leave requests for a specific user.

response.name: Success - Pending Requests Retrieved

request.description: Update a leave request (approve/reject). Requires 'leave:update' permission.

response.name: Success - Leave Request Approved
Success - Leave Request Rejected
Error - Invalid Status Value

item.name: 04 - Leave History
item.description: Access historical leave records from leave_history table

request.description: Get leave history from leave_history table. Can filter by userId, year, and status.

response.name: Success - Leave History Retrieved

item.name: 05 - Leave Allocations (Admin/HR)
item.description: Manage leave allocations - assign leave days to employees

request.description: Get current user's own leave allocations. No special permission needed.

response.name: Success - My Allocations Retrieved

request.description: Get all leave allocations with filters. Requires 'leave_allocation:read' permission.

response.name: Success - All Allocations Retrieved

request.description: Get specific allocation by ID. Requires 'leave_allocation:read' permission.

response.name: Success - Allocation Retrieved
Error - Allocation Not Found

request.description: Create a single leave allocation for one user. Requires 'leave_allocation:create' permission.

response.name: Success - Allocation Created
Error - User Not Found
Error - Leave Type Not Found

request.description: Bulk create allocations for selected users. Provide user_ids array. Requires 'leave_allocation:create' permission.

response.name: Success - Bulk Allocation Created
Error - Invalid User IDs

request.description: Create allocations for ALL active users at once. Uses leave_type's days_per_year as reference. Requires 'leave_allocation:create' permission.

response.name: Success - All Users Allocated

request.description: Update an existing allocation. Requires 'leave_allocation:update' permission.

response.name: Success - Allocation Updated
Error - Used Days Exceed Allocation

request.description: Delete an allocation. Requires 'leave_allocation:delete' permission.

response.name: Success - Allocation Deleted
Error - Allocation Not Found

variable.description: JWT access token obtained after login (from POST /api/auth/login response)
